textByHash.f4440e719ee3d5b014a7dfec2364cf079c3bfcc0: I'm Sherlock, master of clues and challenges.
textByHash.e58c16ea06e915b19f2eae96549d5c1fc56ced12: If you find a scroll that requires my attention, bring it to me and I shall handle it.
textByHash.784c7e2baae7554bd4cc4c3a5a4ff2526e52675b: Ah, just what I was looking for. I have a challenge for you. If you complete it, I'll give you something.
textByHash.98242a716f971d38ae92794d8568798bb74bcd7c: That's nice, but.... I don't really need one of those.
